title: Update docker/libnetwork to get rid of outdated sctp package
body: After the merge of https://github.com/docker/libnetwork/pull/2403, we're now able to update the outdated SCTP package as well.

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

LGTM, test failures are almost certainly not related to this change.
@nalind or @vrotherberg, I'd like a head nod from one of you too.

:pushpin: Commit 39c3b2a has been approved by `rhatdan`
